scope: Rules that determine progression from the group stage through the final.

official_regulations.title: Regulations for the FIFA World Cup 26
relevant_sections: Article 13 - Equal points and qualification for knockout stages

matrix_extraction_snapshot.title: Template:2026 FIFA World Cup third-place table
matrix_extraction_snapshot.note: Used only as a machine-readable extraction of FIFA Annexe C; structural checks and selected rows were validated against the official FIFA regulations.

notation.1A: Winner of Group A. The same pattern applies to 1B through 1L.
notation.2A: Runner-up of Group A. The same pattern applies to 2B through 2L.
notation.3A: Third-placed team from Group A. The same pattern applies to 3B through 3L.
notation.W73: Winner of Match 73. The same pattern applies to every W plus match number.
notation.L101: Loser of Match 101. The same pattern applies where a match loser is referenced.
notation.ANNEX_C_FOR_1B: The third-place opponent assigned to Group B winner by the 495-case Annexe C matrix.

format.description: Twelve groups of four teams; each team plays every other team in its group once.
format.final_matchday_note: The last two matches in each group are scheduled for simultaneous kick-offs unless FIFA stipulates otherwise.

automatic.description: First and second place in every group qualify for the round of 32.

best_third_placed.description: All twelve third-placed teams are compared in one cross-group table. The top eight qualify for the round of 32.
ranking_criteria_in_order: Most points in all group matches
Best goal difference in all group matches
Most goals scored in all group matches
Highest team conduct score in all group matches
Higher position in the most recent published FIFA Men’s World Ranking
Higher position in successively earlier published FIFA Men’s World Rankings until the tie is resolved
best_third_placed.important_pairing_rule: The ranking determines which eight third-placed teams qualify. It does not seed those eight into opponents by rank. Their opponents are assigned by Annexe C according only to which eight groups supplied the qualifiers.

same_group_tiebreakers.applies_when: Two or more teams in the same group finish level on points.
step_1_head_to_head_in_order: Points in group matches among the tied teams
Goal difference in group matches among the tied teams
Goals scored in group matches among the tied teams

step_2.reapply_head_to_head: If step 1 separates some but not all teams, reapply the three head-to-head criteria only to the matches among the teams still tied.
then_in_order: Goal difference in all group matches
Goals scored in all group matches
step_2.non_restart_rule: After moving to the all-group criteria, the process does not restart for teams still tied; continue to the next criterion.

step_3_in_order: Higher position in the most recent published FIFA Men’s World Ranking
Higher position in successively earlier published FIFA Men’s World Rankings until the tie is resolved

team_conduct_score.single_match_limit: Only one of these deductions is applied to a player or team official in a single match.

best_third_place_allocation.description: Eight group winners face the eight qualifying third-placed teams. FIFA Annexe C contains one routing row for every possible set of eight qualifying groups: C(12,8) = 495.
best_third_place_allocation.matrix_key_format: Eight qualifying group letters in alphabetical order, concatenated. Example: ABCDEFGH.
lookup_steps: Rank the twelve third-placed teams using group_stage.qualification.best_third_placed.ranking_criteria_in_order.
Take the group letters of the eight qualifiers and sort them A through L.
Concatenate the letters to form the matrix key.
Use winner_slot_to_round_of_32_match to identify the match number.
best_third_place_allocation.same_group_protection: Teams from the same group cannot meet in the round of 32.

knockout_match_resolution.if_level_after_extra_time: Decide the winner by a penalty shoot-out.

third_place_match.result: Winner finishes third; loser finishes fourth.

final.result: Winner is FIFA World Cup 26 champion; loser is runner-up.

winner_of_group_B.opponent: A qualifying third-placed team from Group E, F, G, I or J, with the exact group selected by the Annexe C matrix after all eight qualifying third-place groups are known.

third_place_from_group_H.qualification: 3H qualifies only if it ranks among the best eight third-placed teams.
third_place_from_group_H.opponent_after_qualification: Look up the eight-group matrix key; find which winner slot is assigned 3H, then use winner_slot_to_round_of_32_match.
